title: Action required: Your plan payment has failed ❌
subject: Action required: Your plan payment has failed ❌
failure_message: We were unable to process your Oxen subscription payment. Your benefits are now on hold.
defer_notice_part2: days to top up your balance to avoid service suspension.
step_1: ✅ Add funds to your Oxen account.
step_2: ✅ We will automatically collect the payment as soon as your balance is sufficient.
